name: player_adp single year_offset shifts the CTE year and join correlation
description: player_adp with year=[2023] + single year_offset=[1] filters the adp CTE to the shifted year (2024) and correlates the join on year=2024, returning the offset-year ADP via the direct-column path (no aggregate).
expected_query: with "t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982" as (select "player_adp_index"."pid", "player_adp_index"."year", "player_adp_index"."adp", "player_adp_index"."min_pick", "player_adp_index"."max_pick", "player_adp_index"."std_dev", "player_adp_index"."sample_size", "player_adp_index"."percent_drafted" from "player_adp_index" inner join "adp_format" on "player_adp_index"."adp_format_id" = "adp_format"."id" where "player_adp_index"."source_id" in ('SLEEPER') and "player_adp_index"."year" in (2024) and "adp_format"."scoring_class" in ('PPR') and "adp_format"."num_qb" in (1) and "adp_format"."duration" in ('REDRAFT') and "adp_format"."draft_pool" in ('ALL') and "adp_format"."contest_style" in ('MANAGED') and "player_adp_index"."adp" < 999), "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982"."adp" AS "adp_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982" on "t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982"."year" = 2024 group by player.fname, player.lname, "t22c9a76f62c8a62fec52ad076663a982"."adp", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
